forbidden_capabilities: model weight, tokenizer, source archive, binary or GGUF commit to Git
production readiness or operational attestation claim
acceptance: exact-main release attestation is accepted with no reasons and remains NOT_ATTESTED
owner-triggered source acquisition run is bound to the same exact-main SHA
Qwen and Mistral exact revisions each have reconciled, locally hashed and cleanly re-downloaded source evidence
source file counts, selected byte totals, SHA-256 chains and artifact identities are recorded
metadata and locator artifacts are digest-bound and retained for 90 days
source bytes were not copied to Git or GitHub Actions artifacts
Ruff, strict mypy, full pytest/coverage, security/runtime and exact-head CI pass
